channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What travelers need to know about Europe's new Entry/Exit System
item.description: Travel experts advise preparing for disruptions as the EU's new Entry/Exit System takes effect.

item.title: Main insights from primary elections in Los Angeles, Iowa and New Jersey
item.description: Key points from the June 2 primary elections.

item.title: Senate advances reconciliation bill, drops ballroom funding
item.description: Senate Republicans plan to move forward Wednesday with a package funding DHS immigration agencies.

item.title: South Dakota GOP governor race heads to runoff after bitter primary
item.description: Businessman Toby Doeden and incumbent Gov. Larry Rhoden advance to a runoff for the GOP nomination.
